explanations: The part carries vertical load as an upright: role COL.
Prismatic member: its cross-section is classified next and referenced by the component.
An open profile was selected, so the open-form families apply.
A C-form open profile was selected; lip condition decides the terminal code.
One stiffening lip fold per flange: open C lipped, OCL.
Product family (FAM) level is outside Phase 1 scope; the path enters at the assembly/role level (rule H3: entry at any level is valid).
Geometry parameters, CanonicalGeometryID computation, and GSID lookup are outside Phase 1 scope; gsid is emitted as null.

decision_trace.input: What functional role does this part play? → Column / upright post
decision_trace.explanation: The part carries vertical load as an upright: role COL.

decision_trace.input: Is it a prismatic member (constant cross-section along its length)? → Yes — constant cross-section
decision_trace.standard_reference: Taxonomy Standard draft §4.9 (prismatic test); rule G-3
decision_trace.explanation: Prismatic member: its cross-section is classified next and referenced by the component.

decision_trace.input: Is the cross-section profile open, closed (hollow), or solid? → Open profile
decision_trace.explanation: An open profile was selected, so the open-form families apply.

decision_trace.input: Which open form is it? → C-form (web + two flanges, same side)
decision_trace.explanation: A C-form open profile was selected; lip condition decides the terminal code.

decision_trace.input: Are there stiffening lips on the flange ends? → Simple lips (one fold per flange)
decision_trace.explanation: One stiffening lip fold per flange: open C lipped, OCL.

designation: COL SMHE OCL (dimensions not captured in Phase 1) L=PARAM

db_mapping.note: Registered identifiers are issued by the SMHE registry, never by this tool.
